ground_truth.title: The Best Electronic Music of 2025
ground_truth.main_content: Bandcamp Daily's guide to the year's crucial electronic LPs. The collection features standout releases including SHERELLE's 'WITH A VENGEANCE' showcasing jungle, drum & bass, and high-speed elevated dance music; Charles Webster's 'From The Hill' a collaborative album with South African artists exploring house and soulful compositions; Matthew Herbert's 'Clay' marking his return to piano house; Bell Curve's 'Magick' featuring smooth, sample-heavy productions; and The Bug vs Ghost Dubs' 'Implosion' capturing live dub techno recorded in London club spaces. Additional notable releases include works by DJ Python, Machine Girl, and offerings from labels like Dark Entries and Phantom.
with: Bandcamp Daily's guide to the year's crucial electronic LPs.
SHERELLE's 'WITH A VENGEANCE' is the year's most essential dance record.
Charles Webster's 'From The Hill' finds the UK legend working with South African artists.
Matthew Herbert's 'Clay' marks his return to piano house.
The Bug vs Ghost Dubs' 'Implosion' captures the best of London's dub techno scene.
